title: Add bounded delegation with cost tracking and quality gates
source: CrewAI post-mortem — bounded delegation prevents loops and cost overruns
description: Add CostTracker class estimating token usage, enforce budget limits per sprint, add retry budgets, and replace auto-approve with quality gate validation.
proposed_changes: Add CostTracker estimating costs from prompt/output lengths. Add max_sprint_cost_usd config. Add quality gate: only auto-approve if valid status + files_changed + description. Emit cost events.
